name: @chio-protocol/edge
description: Chio Protocol Vercel Edge SDK using wasm-pack web artifacts

scripts.test:vercel-edge-sim: bun run build && bun -e "const edge = await import('./dist/index.js'); if (edge.config?.runtime !== 'edge') throw new Error('missing edge runtime config'); const wasm = await Bun.file(new URL('./dist/web/chio_kernel_browser_bg.wasm', import.meta.url)).arrayBuffer(); await edge.loadEdgeWasm(wasm); const response = await edge.default(new Request('https://edge.test/__chio_edge_smoke')); const body = await response.json(); if (!response.ok || body.package !== '@chio-protocol/edge' || body.runtime !== 'edge' || body.wasmTarget !== 'web' || body.verifyReceipt !== true) throw new Error('Vercel Edge smoke failed: ' + JSON.stringify(body)); console.log('vercel edge sim smoke: 1 passed');"
